mapper.insert: INSERT INTO warning_rule (rule_name, warning_type, target_process_id, threshold_value, status) VALUES (#{ruleName}, #{warningType}, #{targetProcessId}, #{thresholdValue}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT wr.*, p.process_name FROM warning_rule wr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.target_process_id = p.id WHERE wr.id = #{id}
SELECT wr.*, p.process_name FROM warning_rule wr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.target_process_id = p.id ORDER BY wr.create_time DESC
SELECT wr.*, p.process_name FROM warning_rule wr LEFT JOIN process_info p ON wr.target_process_id = p.id WHERE wr.status = #{status} ORDER BY wr.create_time DESC
